info.description: Backend API for the SITCON Camp 2026 game.
info.title: Camp 2026 Game API

post.description: User-facing endpoint. Validates the stable auth token from the issued game URL and writes it to the camp2026_auth cookie.
Clears the camp2026_auth cookie for the current browser session.

Set-Cookie.description: camp2026_auth=; Path=/; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Lax; Max-Age=0

get.description: Lists the current player's bingo boards, cells, mission progress, and line reward state.

post.description: Claims a bingo line reward after the required line is completed.
Attempts to complete a mission by player-submitted flag or server-side condition detection.

get.description: Lists all collectible item definitions and acquisition hints.
Lists public crafting recipes and acquisition hints.
Lists all collectible sitone definitions and acquisition hints.
Confirms the HTTP process is alive and the database is reachable.

post.description: Creates a match pairing after scanning another player's QRCode.

get.description: Lists the current player's match history. Results can be filtered by mode and status.

post.description: Starts a match through QRCode pairing, offline duel mode, or world boss mode.

get.description: Returns match status, participants, current question, or completed result for the current player.

post.description: Submits an answer, returns correctness and explanation, and advances match state.

get.description: Upgrades to the shared real-time match WebSocket. The event contract is shared by QR duel, offline duel, and world boss matches.
Returns the current player's QRCode token metadata for identity and match pairing.

post.description: Resolves a player QRCode and returns available user actions for match pairing or staff verification.
Lets staff verify a player activity from a QRCode token and optionally advance a mission.
Lets staff grant open power, sitones, or items to a player resolved from a QRCode token.

get.description: Returns the current player's collection summary, including owned sitones, items, and craftable recipe count.

post.description: Crafts a cosmetic sitone variant or collectible using a sitone and required items.

get.description: Lists items owned by the current player. Items are mainly used for crafting and event collection.
Lists crafting recipes visible to the current player, including whether each recipe is currently craftable.
Lists sitones owned by the current player. Sitones can be assigned to loadout or used in crafting.
Returns the current authenticated user's aggregate state for the homepage and feature pages. This response uses explicit counters instead of frontend route paths or presentation metadata.
Lists active world bosses, shared progress, and the current player's remaining challenge attempts.
Returns a single world boss, current stage progress, remaining attempts, and reward state.

post.description: Starts a world boss match and consumes one player attempt if accepted.

explanation.example: The MIT License is a permissive open source license.

prompt.example: Which license is commonly used for open source projects?

description.example: Complete three Knowledge King questions today.

AuthCookieAuth.description: User auth cookie. Send as `Cookie: camp2026_auth=<base64url-auth-token>`.
AuthCookieAuth.name: Cookie
